## Summary
<!-- 1–3 bullets: what changed and why. Focus on motivation, not diff content. -->

## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Tests

## Agent author (if applicable)
<!-- Leave blank for human-authored. Otherwise fill in. -->
- Agent role: <!-- e.g. backend_developer -->
- Correlation ID: <!-- task correlation_id from the bus -->
- Iteration: <!-- N -->

## Affected ADRs
<!-- ADR numbers this PR implements or contradicts. None if pure code. -->

## Test plan
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`make test-integration`)
- [ ] Coverage on changed lines ≥ 80 % (`diff-cover`)
- [ ] `ruff` + `mypy` clean (`make lint typecheck`)
- [ ] `bandit` clean (no high-severity)
- [ ] Manual smoke if user-facing

## Human approval status
- [ ] Architect review (`@architect` agent or human)
- [ ] **Owner final approval** — required for merge

## Notes / risks
<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay extra attention to. -->
